nodes.label: 2026-01-09 · Phone Call
nodes.detail: Hubertus called Sarah, sounding profoundly distracted and deeply emotional. He cut the routine portfolio talk short, revealing that his 19-year-old daughter, Chloe, was recently diagnosed with a rapidly progressing form of early-onset Parkinson’s Disease. He stated: "Sarah, my mind is completely wiped. My automotive business means nothing if I cannot save my daughter. Everything has changed."

nodes.detail: Urgent strategy realigned. The family has immediately established a dedicated Venture Philanthropy foundation to fund neurodegenerative research. Hubertus gave a fierce, emotional mandate: "Our private wealth is now a weapon to save Chloe. I want our core healthcare and pharma holdings to actively support the entities pushing the boundaries of brain disease research. I need our capital fighting on the frontlines alongside the scientists."
